sections.heading: Portfolio in use
sections.body: This portfolio example presents three fictional case studies so the template demonstrates work samples and outcomes.

cards.title: Portable HTML gallery
cards.body: Converted a route list into a navigable documentation gallery with representative examples.

cards.title: Token alignment
cards.body: Mapped standalone CSS variables back to VPK and ADS semantic values.

cards.title: Static validation
cards.body: Added tests that protect against placeholder examples and broken gallery links.

rows: Every card opens a specific demo
